engine_sound.description: prominent during racing sequences instead of background music

announcer_taunt.description: Yeehaa! shout when driving under lorry trailers (Genesis port)

distinctive_elements: subliminal sampled voice message at 12-second mark warning against piracy
hi-hat and voice sample from Yello's 'Oh Yeah'
engine sound replaces music during racing
influences: arcade racing games like Out Run

notes.data_limitations: Source provides minimal technical audio data. Game documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics rather than musical parameters. No tempo, key signatures, chord progressions, or detailed SFX characteristics documented.
notes.music_approach: Genesis version emphasizes engine sound over background music during races, representing a departure from earlier Amiga/ST versions
